rollback_reason_if_disabled: No live pilot is enabled. The strengthened 32-row generic-specialist replay still fails the promotion bar because referral_needed runtime accuracy is already perfect, the candidate override still produces a false override, and the only remaining improvement signal is concentrated in the narrow 'narrow specialist' wording split.
guardrails: No owner override while enabled=false or kill_switch=true
Only one surface may ever be configured for live pilot evaluation at a time
Low confidence must keep the runtime winner
